articles.title: Conor vs Holloway Again? No One Wants This
articles.description: Conor McGregor vs Max Holloway is being talked about again.And according to Chael Sonnen, that’s a problem. In this breakdown, Chael reacts to a video game trailer that shows Holloway knocking out Conor and what that could actually mean..Is it just promotion?.Or is it hinting at a real fight?Because if it is, Chael isn’t convinced it’s the right move.When it comes to Conor’s return, there’s only one thing fans really want..Something new.Not a fight we’ve already seen..Chael breaks down why this matchup doesn’t check the right boxes, especially at 170 pounds where neither fighter truly belongs long term..There are other opponents.Other options.Fights that actually move things forward.And with limited opportunities left to see Conor compete, every one of them matters.So why go backward?Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the fights that shouldn’t be happening. #UFC #MMA #ConorMcGregor #MaxHolloway #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Video Game Trailer Reaction0:40 Is This a Real Fight Hint?1:20 Why Fans Miss Conor2:00 The One Thing Fans Want2:40 We’ve Already Seen This Fight3:20 The 170 Problem4:00 Why This Doesn’t Work4:40 Better Options for Conor5:10 Final TakeBad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Sean Strickland Has A Secret Weapon For Khamzat!?
articles.description: Khamzat Chimaev vs Sean Strickland is finally here, and after all the drama, threats, beef, and talk about whether this fight would even make it to the Octagon, we’re now looking at one of the most interesting middleweight title fights possible. Michael Bisping breaks down why Khamzat is such a terrifying force, from his explosive wrestling and ridiculous shot speed to the strength Robert Whittaker felt first-hand. But Sean Strickland brings a very different kind of challenge: relentless pressure, constant sparring, awkward striking, toughness, and the ability to drag opponents into a gruelling fight. Can Strickland survive the early storm, stop the takedowns, and force Khamzat into deep waters? Or is Chimaev about to prove that nobody at middleweight is taking that belt from him any time soon? Subscribe for more UFC 328 coverage, fight breakdowns, predictions, and daily MMA content. 🔒 Become a Member for special Perks, Exclusive Content and ultra-exclusive Live Chats: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDrG2_1TcVkXKXXsD6Kjwig/join 🤖 Join The Discord: https://discord.gg/fbb9pc59 ▶️ Follow Michael on Social: https://www.instagram.com/mikebisping https://www.twitter.com/bisping https://www.facebook.com/mikethecountbisping ▶️ Edited by John Brannigan: https://www.instagram.com/johnbranniganuk https://www.twitter.com/johnbranniganuk #bisping #ufc #mma #mixedmartialarts #michaelbisping #ufcnews #mmanews #ufc328 #khamzat #khamzatchimaev #seanstrickland

articles.title: Tom Aspinall’s Update Raises Bigger Questions
articles.description: Tom Aspinall has finally spoken. And according to Chael Sonnen, his update raises more questions than answers. In this breakdown, Chael reacts to Aspinall’s comments about his eye injury, including the claim that he’s progressing well but still not cleared to spar. That alone is interesting. Because along the way, there have been multiple versions of this story. From the UFC saying the injury wasn’t serious, to talk of surgery, to now hearing that he’s still working toward clearance. So what’s actually true? Chael breaks down the mixed messaging, including comments from Aspinall’s manager and what it could mean for his next fight. With plans to face the winner of Alex Pereira vs Ciryl Gane, the timeline suddenly matters more than ever. And there’s one moment that could tell you everything. If Aspinall shows up in person for that fight, it signals confidence. If he doesn’t, it may say the opposite. Because right now, it’s not about what’s being said. It’s about what happens next. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the questions no one is answering. #UFC #MMA #TomAspinall #ChaelSonnenBad' Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: This Grudge Isn’t What You Think...
articles.description: Dominick Cruz says the face-off between Sean Strickland and Khamzat Chimaev should be canceled. According to Chael Sonnen, that might be exactly why fans want to see it even more. In this breakdown, Chael reacts to the growing narrative around this fight being one of the most intense grudges in MMA. But when you actually look at the history, the story doesn’t quite match the hype. These two fighters trained together. They were once in the same room, working under the same system, without any major issues. The idea that this is some long-standing personal rivalry doesn’t line up with how things actually unfolded. So where did it come from? Chael breaks down how narratives build over time, how fighters can talk themselves into believing a rivalry, and how the promotion side of the sport can amplify something that wasn’t originally there. That doesn’t mean the fight isn’t real. It just means the story might not be. Because when you strip everything back, this isn’t about hate. It’s about competition. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the rivalries that aren’t what they seem. #UFC #MMA #SeanStrickland #KhamzatChimaev #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Cruz Wants It Canceled 0:40 Now You Want It More 1:30 Is This Really a Grudge? 2:30 The Gym History 3:30 Where This Started 4:30 The Fight That Didn’t Happen 5:30 How Narratives Build 6:30 Is This Real or Not? 7:30 The Face-Off Is Happening Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Carlos Prates Just Changed Everything
articles.description: Carlos Prates didn’t just win. He dominated Jack Della Maddalena. In this breakdown, Chael Sonnen reacts to a performance that completely shifts the welterweight division. Because this wasn’t a close fight. It was a beating. And that creates a problem. Jack had already been used as a measuring stick against Islam Makhachev. Now, with Prates delivering a more decisive result, it forces a new conversation about where everyone actually stands. From there, the entire division gets complicated. Chael breaks down the ripple effect, including what this means for Ian Machado Garry, Michael Morales, and even a potential opportunity with Conor McGregor. Because the fight for the next shot isn’t clear anymore. Garry might be the biggest draw. Morales might be the best unknown. And now Prates has forced his way into the conversation. So what happens next? Because after this performance, everything is on the table. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the division that just changed overnight. #UFC #MMA #CarlosPrates #JackDellaMaddalena #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Prates Beats Jack Down0:40 Why This Was Different1:30 What This Means for Islam2:30 Is Prates the Best?3:30 Garry vs Morales Debate4:30 The Conor Factor5:30 Why This Gets Complicated6:30 Who Gets the Next Shot7:30 Everything Just Changed Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: McGregor vs Prates Is Bigger Than a Title #ufc
articles.description: Conor McGregor vs Carlos Prates isn’t just a fight—it’s bigger than a title. In this clip, the real business of MMA gets exposed. At 170 pounds right now, the biggest opportunity isn’t a championship—it’s McGregor. “Red panty night” is still the most valuable ticket in the sport, and every fighter knows it. If you’re Prates and you’ve got momentum, the move isn’t to chase a belt against Islam Makhachev—it’s to chase the spotlight. A headliner with McGregor changes everything: money, exposure, and career trajectory in one night. And here’s the key—if that offer was ever on the table, it’s something Prates needs to push publicly. In today’s fight game, you don’t wait for opportunities—you build them. Because the reality is simple: titles matter… but McGregor fights can matter more. This is the strategy behind the scenes—the decisions that define careers before the cage door even closes. Subscribe for more MMA breakdowns, bold takes, and real fight business insight. #ConorMcGregor #CarlosPrates #UFC #MMA #RedPantyNight #IslamMakhachev #FightTalk

articles.description: Daniel Cormier IS BACK after what was a CRAZY Carlos Prates TKO victory over Jack Della Maddalena in Perth, Australia! After racking up wins against two former champs in Leon Edwards and now JDM, DC feels like Prates deserves a title shot right now. If Islam Makhachev and Ian Garry are the next title fight in the division, DC says Prates has done enough to earn that next title shot, even if he does not fight Michael Morales. Hear Cormier's breakdown of the fight, who's next for Prates, and what's going down atop the division! All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms! articles.title: Strickland Took It Too Far, Way Too Far #ufc
articles.description: Sean Strickland just said something that takes this beyond fight promotion—and that’s where the problem starts. In this clip, the conversation around Strickland’s comments involving Khamzat Chimaev gets addressed head-on. Trash talk is part of the fight game—it always has been. But there’s a line, and once it crosses into real-world threats, it stops being promotion and starts becoming something else entirely. What makes this situation more serious is the context. Both fighters have reputations—Strickland for being outspoken, Chimaev for his intensity and close circle. That combination makes comments like this hit differently, and not in a good way. This isn’t about shutting down personality or hype. It’s about keeping the sport where it belongs—inside the cage. The best rivalries in MMA are built on competition, not escalation outside of it. At the end of the day, fans want fights—not headlines for the wrong reasons. Subscribe for more MMA breakdowns, real talk, and sharp takes on the fight game. #SeanStrickland #KhamzatChimaev #UFC #MMA #FightTalk #MMANews #CombatSports

articles.title: Chimaev Wrecks the 205 Division
articles.description: Khalil Rountree Jr. believes Khamzat Chimaev could disrupt the light heavyweight division. According to Chael Sonnen, that might not be the real story. In this breakdown, Chael reacts to Rountree’s comments and uses them to challenge one of the most common assumptions in combat sports. The idea that bigger fighters always have the advantage. Because historically, that hasn’t been true. Chael explains why champions moving up in weight often succeed, while moving down presents a completely different challenge. The speed, pressure, and skill of smaller fighters create problems that size alone can’t solve. That leads to a bigger point. The most dangerous opponent isn’t the one above you. It’s the one right below you. From boxing legends to modern MMA champions, the pattern shows up again and again. And it changes how you should think about matchups across every division. So is this about Chimaev being that good? Or is it about a truth the sport keeps ignoring? Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the myths that shape fighting. #UFC #MMA #KhamzatChimaev #KhalilRountree #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Roundtree’s Chimaev Take 0:40 Could He Ruin 205? 1:30 The Size Myth 2:30 Why Bigger Isn’t Better 3:30 Historic Examples 4:30 Moving Up vs Moving Down 5:30 The Real Hardest Fight 6:30 Why This Keeps Happening 7:30 The Truth About Matchups Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: You Don’t Actually Care About Fighters
articles.description: Boost Testosterone with OXFORCE! https://www.PrimeBrands.com! For a limited time the first 100 Men that purchase today get a FREE OXFORCE shirt! As men your testosterone boost is essential to get what you need in life! Visit and learn more at https://www.PrimeBrands.com Oscar De La Hoya went in front of Congress and made his case. According to Chael Sonnen, it didn’t work. In this breakdown, Chael reacts to the GFL announcement, the push for fighter advocacy, and the broader conversation around who actually “cares” about fighters in combat sports. Because this isn’t a new idea. Promotions have tried it before. Building a brand around taking care of fighters, improving conditions, and doing things the “right way.” And every time, the result is the same. It doesn’t sell. Chael breaks down why fans say they care, but don’t act like it. From ticket sales to pay-per-views, the reality of the business tells a different story. Convenience wins. Entertainment wins. The fight itself wins. Not the message. He also reacts to how Oscar presented his argument, why delivery matters, and how sincerity can change perception even when the outcome is already decided. So what actually works? Because if this angle doesn’t move the audience, then what does? Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the business of fighting. #UFC #MMA #OscarDeLaHoya #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Oscar Goes to Congress0:40 The GFL Announcement1:30 Do Fans Actually Care?2:30 Why This Has Failed Before3:30 The IFL Example4:30 Why Oscar Lost the Room5:30 Reading vs Speaking6:30 The Business Reality7:30 The Truth Nobody Says Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: The Ronda vs Gina Story Is Made Up
articles.description: Boost Testosterone with OXFORCE! https://www.PrimeBrands.com! For a limited time the first 100 Men that purchase today get a FREE OXFORCE shirt! As men your testosterone boost is essential to get what you need in life! Visit and learn more at https://www.PrimeBrands.com The Ronda vs Gina Story Is Made Up Francis Ngannou says this fight has been building for years. According to Chael Sonnen, that is simply not true. In this breakdown, Chael reacts to Ngannou picking Ronda Rousey over Gina Carano and challenges the idea that this is some long-standing rivalry. Because it isn’t. Chael walks through the actual history of women’s MMA at the time and explains how the real conversation was centered around Cris Cyborg, not Ronda and Gina. The idea that these two have a decade-long connection is a narrative that simply didn’t exist. And yet… people believe it. That’s what makes this interesting. Chael breaks down how fight promotion works, why fabricated narratives are hard to sustain, and why this particular story is being told anyway. At the same time, he gives credit where it’s due. Ronda’s promotion of this fight has been some of the best work of her career. So what matters more? The truth… or the story people are willing to believe? articles.title: HE SAID THIS?!
articles.description: Nothing is off limits in this edition of Ask Uncle Chael. In this fan-driven segment, Chael Sonnen takes on questions from across the fight world and delivers answers that are anything but predictable. From the reality of Jorge Masvidal returning to the UFC, to what actually separates the UFC from every other promotion, Chael breaks down topics with his usual mix of honesty and perspective. He also dives into how fight promotion really works, why resumes don’t matter the way people think they do, and what smaller creators get wrong when trying to build an audience. And as always, things don’t stay on track for long. From weight cutting strategies to wild hypotheticals, this episode covers everything from serious analysis to completely unexpected turns. Because when Chael is answering your questions, you never really know where it’s going next. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the questions fans actually want answered. #UFC #MMA #ChaelSonnen #AskUncleChael 0:00 Ask Uncle Chael Begins 0:30 Masvidal Not Returning 1:30 Why Fighters Don’t Leave on Their Terms 2:30 What UFC Does Better Than Everyone 4:00 Why Resumes Don’t Matter 5:30 RAF Contender Series Talk 6:30 Brutal Advice for Creators 8:30 Arman Situation Explained 10:00 Water Cutting Explained 12:00 Promo Work Never Ends 13:30 Bo Bassett Is the Real Deal Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: The Division Needs Prates to Win
articles.description: Carlos Prates is the betting favorite over Jack Della Maddalena And according to Chael Sonnen, that doesn’t add up. In this breakdown, Chael reacts to the odds and questions how this fight is being viewed. While Prates has momentum, Jack is fighting at home and has already proven himself at the highest level. The line feels off. But the bigger issue isn’t just the fight. It’s what happens after. Chael breaks down the current state of the welterweight division, including what’s next for Islam Makhachev and why there may not be a meaningful announcement coming. With potential matchups involving Ian Machado Garry or Michael Morales, the path forward lacks clarity. That’s where this fight matters. If Prates wins, the division moves forward with a new contender. If he loses, things stall. Because right now, there isn’t a clear direction. And that makes this line even more confusing. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the fights that don’t add up. #UFC #MMA #CarlosPrates #JackDellaMaddalena #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Prates Is the Favorite 0:40 Why That’s Surprising 1:30 What’s Happening at 170 2:30 No Big Fight for Islam 3:30 Why This Fight Matters 4:30 What Happens If Prates Wins 5:30 What Happens If Jack Wins 6:30 The Division Gets Stuck 7:30 Nobody Knows What’s Next Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: The Real Risk for Chimaev…
articles.description: Darren Till supports Khamzat Chimaev. But he also raised a concern. In this breakdown, Chael Sonnen reacts to Till’s comments on the matchup with Sean Strickland and explains why one small detail could matter more than anything else. Because Till has been in the room with both guys. He has felt their pace. Their pressure. Their style. And while he believes Chimaev will be the bigger, stronger presence, he also pointed to something specific. If Chimaev uses too much energy early, this could become a very difficult fight. That stands out. Chael breaks down why fatigue is often misunderstood in MMA, and why being tired does not always mean a fighter is fading. But when multiple fighters who have trained with Chimaev bring up the same concern, it becomes harder to ignore. Especially against someone like Strickland. A fighter who keeps pushing, round after round. Because this fight may not come down to skill. It may come down to when the energy is spent. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the details that decide fights. #UFC #MMA #DarrenTill #KhamzatChimaev #SeanStrickland #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Darren Till Speaks on the Fight 0:45 Why His Opinion Matters 1:30 What Till Said About Strickland 2:30 The “Bigger, Stronger” Question 3:30 The Round One Warning 4:30 The Conditioning Narrative 5:30 Why Being Tired Doesn’t Matter 6:30 The Real Question About Chimaev 7:30 Why This Detail MattersBad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: The Problem with Ronda and MVP Overthrowing UFC
articles.description: The Problem with Ronda and MVP Ronda Rousey keeps saying the same thing. MVP is going to overthrow the UFC. And somehow, it’s working. In this breakdown, Chael Sonnen explains why this storyline has taken on a life of its own, even though the fundamentals don’t add up. Because when you really look at it, nothing about the fight is clear. We don’t know the weight class. We don’t know the rounds. We barely know the structure. And yet, people are debating a head-to-head battle between promotions like it’s real. That’s the interesting part. Chael breaks down how Ronda has created headlines without relying on the fight itself, and why that might be more powerful than traditional promotion. At the same time, he questions whether the model can actually hold together, especially with one-off deals, uncertain talent, and no long-term structure. So what are we really watching? A real shift in the sport… or just a great story being told? Because right now, both things seem possible. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the narratives that don’t quite add up. #UFC #MMA #RondaRousey #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Ronda Says It Again0:40 Why Repeating It Works1:30 MVP vs UFC Narrative2:30 We Don’t Know the Fight3:30 Why This Is So Strange4:30 Ronda’s Real Impact5:30 Why MVP Model Is Risky6:30 This Doesn’t Add Up7:30 But It’s Still Working Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Sean Strickland Crossed the Line
articles.description: Sean Strickland just took things too far. In this breakdown, Chael Sonnen reacts to Strickland’s comments about Khamzat Chimaev and explains why this situation is different from normal fight promotion. Because this is no longer just talk. Chael breaks down how quickly these situations can become real, especially when there is history, tension, and the possibility of fighters running into each other outside of the cage. In a sport where confrontation is part of the build, there is still a line. And this crossed it. Drawing from his own experience with heated rivalries and real-world altercations, Chael explains why introducing a weapon changes everything. What might start as promotion can quickly become something much more serious. The message is simple. Do everything else. Build the fight. Create the moment. Just don’t bring a gun into it. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the moments that go too far. #UFC #MMA #SeanStrickland #KhamzatChimaev #ChaelSonnen 0:00 What Strickland Said 0:40 Why This Crosses the Line 1:30 This Could Actually Happen 2:30 Chael’s Brazil Story 4:00 The Problem With Bringing a Gun 5:30 Why This Changes Everything 6:30 Promotion vs Reality 7:30 Just Don’t Bring a Gun Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Conor McGregor Said Yes to Carlos Prates
articles.description: Conor McGregor already had his next fight. According to Chael Sonnen, the matchup was set. The opponent was Carlos Prates. And Conor said yes. So what happened? In this breakdown, Chael explains how quickly things can shift in the fight business, and why the biggest opportunities are often the hardest to hold onto. Despite accepting the fight, McGregor never made it to the Octagon with Prates, and the conversation quietly disappeared. That matters. Because right now, at 170 pounds, the biggest opportunity is not a title fight. It is Conor McGregor. Chael breaks down why fighters should be calling for that fight, how one moment on the microphone can change everything, and why nobody in this current matchup is taking advantage of the opportunity in front of them. The blueprint is simple. Win the fight. Call out Conor. But if nobody says it, nothing happens. Because in this division, there is one prize bigger than the belt. And it is still Conor McGregor. Watch more breakdowns and get the real story behind the fights that almost happened. #UFC #MMA #ConorMcGregor #CarlosPrates #ChaelSonnen 0:00 Who Is Conor Fighting Next 0:45 Why Rumors Usually Mean Something 1:30 The Max Holloway Clue 2:30 Conor Accepted the Prates Fight 3:30 What Went Wrong 4:30 Why This Isn’t About a Title 5:30 Red Panty Night Is Still Real6 :30 Why Nobody Is Calling Him Out 7:30 The Opportunity Being Missed Bad Guy Inc merch now available at https://BadGuyInc.com Click here to subscribe: https://bit.ly/3FrHIPK Follow me on IG: https://bit.ly/3HY7BIE Follow me on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3tvY5J7 Follow me on Threads https://www.threads.com/@sonnench

articles.title: Carlos Ulberg CALLS OUT Alex Pereira after BEATING Jiri Prochazka for UFC belt | Daniel Cormier Show
articles.description: Daniel Cormier is joined by new UFC Light Heavyweight champion Carlos Ulberg, where he talks about wanting to fight Alex Pereira after beating Jiri Prochazka to win the vacant Light Heavyweight belt. Alex is moving up to heavyweight to fight Ciryl Gane at the White House in June, but Ulberg wants Alex after that fight as he has been the king of the Light Heavyweight division. Carlos says that in order to be “the man,” you have to beat “the man,” and that is Alex Pereira. All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms!
